# shell

App shell for Forge. Registers the /forge app entry and defines Forge.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Forge. Registers the /forge app entry and defines Forge.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.
- Web:
  - Slots: `Forge.Sidebar`, `Forge.Toolbar`
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Forge" → `ForgeLayout`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`
  - Exports: Values: `Forge`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Slot contributors: `catalog`, `publish`
